items.headline: McCarthy's slam sails above foul pole as Rockies take home finale

news_items.headline: White saves the day, robs Muncy at wall with wild catch
Carlos Rodon battles, but walks the ‘bugaboo’ in return to Yankees' rotation
news_items.summary: Yankees lefty Carlos Rodon showed some positives, but was hurt by leadoff walks as he made his season debut on Sunday.

news_items.headline: Boras: Tigers ace Skubal could have short rehab
news_items.summary: Tigers ace Skubal could return sooner than the typical multimonth timeline typical of pitchers who undergo his procedure, according to agent Scott Boras.

news_items.headline: Dodgers get boost with Betts' return set for Mon.
news_items.summary: Mookie Betts is set to return after missing more than a month because of a right oblique strain when the Dodgers open a four-game series vs. the Giants on Monday.

news_items.headline: Perkins keys win on 1st Mother's Day without mom
news_items.summary: Milwaukee Brewers outfielder Blake Perkins said he felt "joy" playing for his mom on his first Mother's Day since her death.

news_items.headline: Rangers' deGrom second fastest to 1,900 K's
news_items.summary: Rangers right-hander Jacob deGrom earned his 1,900th career strikeout in the first inning against the Cubs, becoming the second-fastest pitcher to that milestone by games and innings.

news_items.headline: Tolle honors late mom with gameday attire, song
news_items.summary: Pitching two years and a day after his mother, Jina, died following a nearly eight-year battle with colon cancer, Payton Tolle honored her by wearing his pant legs near his knees showing his pink socks on Mother's Day.

news_items.headline: Rodón on debut: 'Velo's great,' but not control
news_items.summary: Carlos Rodón's seven-month recovery from elbow surgery apparently didn't do anything to hinder the Yankees left-hander's velocity. His ability to throw strikes remains a work in progress.

news_items.headline: Red Sox 1B Contreras HBP on hand, leaves game
news_items.summary: The Red Sox said initial tests on Willson Contreras came back negative after he left Sunday's game against the Rays with a bruised right hand suffered when he was hit by a fastball from Tampa Bay's Nick Martinez.

news_items.headline: ⚾ A May MLB trade!? Grading the deal
news_items.summary: Cleveland acquired an elite defensive catcher from San Francisco. Which side fared best in the surprising swap?

news_items.headline: Royals drop finale 6-3 to Detroit
news_items.summary: A disappointing end to a solid homestand

news_items.headline: Mets prospects A.J. Ewing, Ryan Clifford enjoy big days at the plate with Syracuse
news_items.summary: The Syracuse Mets suffered their third straight loss to the Rochester Red Wings on Sunday, but some of the organizations top young talents enjoyed another big day.

news_items.headline: Mets close road trip 5-4 after another poor offensive showing: 'We're better than that'
news_items.summary: After winning four of six to open the road trip and the month of May, the Mets have now lost three of their last four and have scored just seven runs over that span.

news_items.headline: Tigers 6, Royals 3: The kids are alright, again
news_items.summary: A bullpen day went well, and Matt Vierling and the kids powered the Tigers over the Royals.

news_items.headline: 1 thing each team can improve upon the rest of the way
How to surge to No. 1 in Power Rankings? Rip off another 10-game win streak
Jesus loves the mothers
news_items.summary: Jesus Rodriguez needed two chances to deliver the walk-off goods in a stressful Mother’s Day win over the Pirates

news_items.headline: Purple Row After Dark: East Coast schedule bias?
news_items.summary: The Rockies have played 18 games against the NL East and only 11 vs. the NL West

news_items.headline: Sean Murphy status for Cubs series uncertain, Eli White in concussion protocol
news_items.summary: Atlanta leaves LA with two key players battling the injury bug.
